title: What doctoral programs must change in an AI-saturated research environment
summary_en: Generative AI has moved from novelty to a core tool in a remarkably short period of time. Doctoral students now routinely use AI tools to locate sources, summarize literature, generate outlines, and even draft sections of academic writing.
title_cn: 人工智能高度饱和科研环境下博士培养项目的必要变革
